name: Chen
description: A potent Bruiser that wears downs enemies and is resistant to burst damage.
title: Legendary Brewmaster
info: To be a brewmaster is to be an explorer, a lover of nature, and when the need arises; a powerful fighter. For years Chen Stormstout has wandered the world of Azeroth in search of rare ingredients, stirring stories, and of course, good brew.

Chen.name: Flying Kick
Chen.description: Kick through target enemy, dealing 120 (+4% per level) damage.

Chen.name: Keg Smash
Chen.description: Deal 50 (+4% per level) damage and soak enemies in Brew for 3 seconds, Slowing them by 10%. After 1.25 seconds, the Slow is increased to 40%.  After being used, this Ability becomes Breath of Fire.  Breath of Fire Deal damage and Ignite Brew-soaked enemies.

Chen.name: Stagger
Chen.description: Damage taken over the next 3 seconds is prevented.  Once this effect ends, Chen receives 75% of the damage taken over 5 seconds. This damage cannot be modified.

Chen.name: Storm, Earth, Fire
Chen.description: After 1 second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for 12 seconds, each with 70% of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability.  The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well.  Storm can grant the spirits a Shield.  Earth can leap to an area and Slow enemies.  Fire can grant the spirits Attack Speed, damage.

Chen.name: Wandering Keg
Chen.description: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with 70% increased Movement Speed and 25 Armor, dealing 59 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for 5 seconds.

Chen.name: Fortifying Brew
Chen.description: Chen drinks from his keg, gaining 50 Brew and 180 (+4% per level) temporary Shields per second, up to a maximum of 540 (+4% per level) while drinking. Shields persist for 4 seconds after he stops drinking.

Chen.name: Breath of Fire
Chen.description: Breathe a cone of flames, dealing 40 (+4% per level) damage. Enemies that are soaked in Brew are Ignited, dealing 342 (+4% per level) additional damage over 6 seconds and adding 1.5 seconds to the duration of the Slow from Keg Smash.  After being used or after 6 seconds, this ability becomes Keg Smash.  Keg Smash Damage and Slow enemies.

ChenStormEarthFire.name: Storm
ChenStormEarthFire.description: The spirits gain a Shield for 400 (+4% per level) over 3 seconds.  If this is the final Ability cast, the shield amount is increased to 750 (+4% per level) with no limited duration, and the duration of Storm, Earth, Fire is increased by 5 seconds.

ChenStormEarthFire.name: Earth
ChenStormEarthFire.description: Fire and Earth leap to the target location, dealing 32 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing enemies in a large area by 70% for 1.5 seconds.  If this is the final Ability cast, increase the damage dealt by 300% and instead of Slowing, the leap Roots enemy Heroes hit for 1.75 seconds.

ChenStormEarthFire.name: Fire
ChenStormEarthFire.description: Increase the Attack Speed and Basic Attack damage of the spirits by 50% for 5 seconds.  If this is the final Ability cast, the Attack Speed and damage bonus is increased to 75% and the spirits gain 50% Movement Speed for its duration.

1.name: Accumulating Flame
1.description: Reward: Damage enemy Heroes with Breath of Fire to permanently increase periodic damage by 0.25. Kills grant 2.  Reward: After gaining 20 damage, increase the range of Keg Smash.  Mythic Reward: Upon gaining 75 damage, Breath of Fire reduces enemy Armor by 20 and its duration is increased by 0.75 seconds each time Chen attacks the Hero.

1.name: Freshest Ingredients
1.description: Increase the healing duration of Regeneration Globes by 150%.  Quest: Gather 15 Regeneration Globes.  Reward: Reduce Fortifying Brew's cooldown by 2 seconds, and 50% of its Shield persists indefinitely after drinking.

1.name: Stormstout Secret Recipe
1.description: Chen heals for 3.5% of his maximum Health when his Basic Abilities hit an enemy Hero.

4.name: Deadly Strike
4.description: Flying Kick no longer costs Brew. Additionally, its damage is increased by 125% while Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.

4.name: Eye of the Tiger
4.description: Basic Attacks against Brew-soaked enemy Heroes deal 50% more damage and heal Chen for 60% of the damage done.

4.name: Withering Flames
4.description: Igniting an enemy Hero reduces their Spell Power by 60% for 4 seconds.

7.name: Gift of the Ox
7.description: Increase the duration of Stagger's damage prevention by 2 seconds, and reduce the amount of damage taken over time to 50% of damage taken.

7.name: Brewmaster's Balance
7.description: While at or below 50 Brew, gain 20% Movement Speed. While at or above 50 Brew, regenerate an additional 18 (+4% per level) Health per second.

7.name: Elusive Brawler
7.description: Activate to gain 20% Movement Speed and Evade enemy Basic Attacks for 2 seconds. Chen's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 2 seconds.

10.name: Wandering Keg
10.description: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with 70% increased Movement Speed and 25 Armor, dealing 59 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for 5 seconds.

10.name: Storm, Earth, Fire
10.description: After 1 second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for 12 seconds, each with 70% of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability.  The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well.  Storm can grant the spirits a Shield.  Earth can leap to an area and Slow enemies.  Fire can grant the spirits Attack Speed, damage.

13.name: Pressure Point
13.description: Flying Kick Slows the target enemy by 40% for 1.5 seconds, or by 80% if Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.

13.name: A Touch of Honey
13.description: Increase the Slows from Keg Smash by 30% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.

13.name: Ring of Fire
13.description: After Igniting an enemy, become bathed in a fiery aura, dealing 60 (+4% per level) damage every second to nearby enemies for 6 seconds.

13.name: Enough to Share
13.description: Fortifying Brew instantly grants Chen a Shield that absorbs 180 (+4% per level) damage, and each second grants nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs 140 (+4% per level) damage, up to 420 (+4% per level).

16.name: Flying Leap
16.description: Increase Flying Kick's range by 15% and reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds each time an enemy Hero takes damage from being Ignited.

16.name: Celerity
16.description: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Stagger by 2 seconds and grant Chen 30 Armor for 3 seconds.

16.name: Combo Strikes
16.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same target deals 75% bonus damage. While Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew and for 2 seconds after, he gains 35% Attack Speed.

20.name: Untapped Potential
20.description: Increase Wandering Keg's Movement Speed bonus from 70% to 125%, and its Armor bonus to 75 for its duration and 5 seconds afterwards.

20.name: Elemental Conduit
20.description: Increase the spirits' Health to 100% of Chen's maximum Health and all of their Abilities are empowered.

20.name: Purifying Brew
20.description: Casting Fortifying Brew grants Chen Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.

20.name: Energizing Brew
20.description: If Chen Channels Fortifying Brew for its full duration, then he gains 20% bonus Health and 20% bonus damage for 25 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.ChenAccumulatingFlame: Reward: Damage enemy Heroes with Breath of Fire to permanently increase periodic damage by . Kills grant .Reward: After gaining 20 damage, increase the range of Keg Smash.Mythic Reward: Upon gaining 75 damage, Breath of Fire reduces enemy Armor by 20 and its duration is increased by seconds each time Chen attacks the Hero.
tooltipMarkup.ChenBreathOfFire: Breathe a cone of flames, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChenBreathOfFireDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Enemies that are soaked in Brew are Ignited, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChenBreathOfFireDoTDamage,Amount*Behavior,ChenBreathofFireDoT,Duration"/></c> additional damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenBreathofFireDoT,Duration"/></c> seconds and adding <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChenBreathofFireBoggedDownModifySlowBehaviorBuffDuration,Value"Precision="2"/></c> seconds to the duration of the Slow from Keg Smash. <n/><n/>After being used or after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenBreathOfFireKegSmashAbilityChangeTimerBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds, this ability becomes Keg Smash.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorYellow">Keg Smash</c><n/>Damage and Slow enemies.
tooltipMarkup.ChenBreathOfFireRingOfFireTalent: After Igniting an enemy, become bathed in a fiery aura, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChenBreathOfFireRingOfFireTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage every second to nearby enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenBreathofFireRingOfFire,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChenCelerityStagger: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Stagger by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChenCelerityStaggerModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> seconds and grant Chen <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenCelerityStaggerArmorBuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenCelerityStaggerArmorBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChenEarth: Fire and Earth leap to the target location, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChenEarthLeapDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slowing enemies in a large area by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ChenEarthLeapSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenEarthLeapSlow,Duration"precision="1"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>If this is the final Ability cast, increase the damage dealt by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ChenEarthLeapDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[EarthEmpoweredDamageBuff].Modifier"/>%</c> and instead of Slowing, the leap Roots enemy Heroes hit for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenEarthEmpoweredLeapRoot,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChenElusiveBrawler: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChenElusiveBrawlerMovementSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed and Evade enemy Basic Attacks for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenElusiveBrawler,Duration"/></c> seconds. Chen's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChenElusiveBrawlerModifyPlayerCooldown,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChenEyeOfTheTiger: Basic Attacks against Brew-soaked enemy Heroes deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ChenHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[EyeOfTheTiger].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage and heal Chen for<c val="#TooltipNumbers"> <d ref="100*Effect,ChenHeroWeaponDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of the damage done.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFire: Increase the Attack Speed and Basic Attack damage of the spirits by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChenFireStormEarthFireAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenFireStormEarthFireAttackSpeedBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>If this is the final Ability cast, the Attack Speed and damage bonus is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChenFireStormEarthFireEmpoweredAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> and the spirits gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChenFireStormEarthFireEmpoweredMovementSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed for its duration.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFlyingKick: Kick through target enemy, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChenFlyingKickDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFlyingKickDeadlyStrikeTalent: Flying Kick no longer costs Brew. Additionally, its damage is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ChenFlyingKickDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[DeadlyStrikeDamage].Modifier"/>%</c> while Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFlyingKickPressurePointTalent: Flying Kick Slows the target enemy by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ChenFlyingKickPressurePointSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="2"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenFlyingKickPressurePointSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds, or by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ChenFlyingKickPressurePointSlowBrewDrenched,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> if Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFlyingLeap: Increase Flying Kick's range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,ChenFlyingLeap,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value/Abil,ChenFlyingKick,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c> and reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChenFlyingKickFlyingLeapModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> seconds each time an enemy Hero takes damage from being Ignited.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFortifyingBrew: Chen drinks from his keg, gaining <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="8*Effect,ChenFortifyingBrewModifyEnergy,VitalArray[Energy].Change"/></c> Brew and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenFortifyingBrewShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit *2"/></c> temporary Shields per second, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenFortifyingBrewShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit * Behavior,ChenFortifyingBrewShield,MaxStackCount"/></c> while drinking. Shields persist for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenFortifyingBrewController,Duration"/></c> seconds after he stops drinking.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFortifyingBrewBrewmastersBalanceTale: While at or below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Brew, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChenBrewmastersBalanceSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed. While at or above <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Brew, regenerate an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenBrewmastersBalanceHealthRegen,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Life]"/></c> Health per second.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFortifyingBrewComboStrikesTalent: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3rd</c> Basic Attack against the same target deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ChenHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[FortifyingBrewComboStrikes].Modifier"/>%</c> bonus damage. While Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChenFortifyingBrewComboStrikesAttackSpeedBuffApplyBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds after, he gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChenFortifyingBrewComboStrikesAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Attack Speed.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFortifyingBrewEnergizingBrewTalent: If Chen Channels Fortifying Brew for its full duration, then he gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Behavior,ChenEnergizingBrewFortifyingBrewHealthBuff,Modification.VitalMaxArray[Life])/(Unit,HeroChen,LifeMax)"/>%</c> bonus Health and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ChenBreathOfFireDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[EnergizingBrewDamage].Modifier"/>%</c> bonus damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenEnergizingBrewFortifyingBrewHealthBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFortifyingBrewEnoughToShareTalent: Fortifying Brew instantly grants Chen a Shield that absorbs <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenFortifyingBrewShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit*Effect,ChenFortifyingBrewApplyEnoughToShareTalentStacks,Count"/></c> damage, and each second grants nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenFortifyingBrewEnoughToShareAlliedShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit*2"/></c> damage, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenFortifyingBrewEnoughToShareAlliedShield,MaxStackCount*Behavior,ChenFortifyingBrewEnoughToShareAlliedShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.ChenFreshestIngredients: Increase the healing duration of Regeneration Globes by %.Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes.Reward: Reduce Fortifying Brew's cooldown by seconds, and 50% of its Shield persists indefinitely after drinking.
tooltipMarkup.ChenGiftOfTheOxStagger: Increase the duration of Stagger's damage prevention by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ChenGiftOfTheOxStagger,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"Precision="2"/></c> seconds, and reduce the amount of damage taken over time to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of damage taken.
tooltipMarkup.ChenKegSmash: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChenKegSmashDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and soak enemies in Brew for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenKegSmashDrenched,Duration"Player="0"/></c> seconds, Slowing them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ChenKegSmashSlow,Modification[0].UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor[0] * 100" player="0"/>%</c>. After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenKegSmashSlow,Duration"Precision="2"Player="0"/></c> seconds, the Slow is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ChenKegSmashBoggedDownSlow,Modification[0].UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor[0] * 100" player="0"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>After being used, this Ability becomes Breath of Fire.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorRed">Breath of Fire</c><n/>Deal damage and Ignite Brew-soaked enemies.
tooltipMarkup.ChenKegSmashATouchOfHoneyTalent: Increase the Slows from Keg Smash by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Talent,ChenMasteryKegSmashATouchOfHoney,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/>%</c> and its duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ChenMasteryKegSmashATouchOfHoney,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[3].Value"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChenPurifyingBrew: Casting Fortifying Brew grants Chen Unstoppable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenPurifyingBrewUnstoppableBuff,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChenStagger: Damage taken over the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenStaggerProtectedBuff,Duration"Player="0"/></c> seconds is prevented.  Once this effect ends, Chen receives <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> of the damage taken over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenStaggerDoT,Duration"Player="0"/></c> seconds. This damage cannot be modified.
tooltipMarkup.ChenStorm: The spirits gain a Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenStormShieldBuff,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenStormShieldBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>If this is the final Ability cast, the shield amount is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenStormEmpoweredShieldBuff,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> with no limited duration, and the duration of Storm, Earth, Fire is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChenStormStormEarthFireEmpoweredCastModifyTimedLife,Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChenStormEarthFire: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ChenStormEarthFire,CastIntroTime"/></c> second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StormEarthFireCasterBehavior,Duration[0]"/></c> seconds, each with <c val="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability.  The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well.<n/><n/><c val="00ffff">Storm</c> can grant the spirits a Shield. <n/><c val="00ff00">Earth</c> can leap to an area and Slow enemies. <n/><c val="ff6600">Fire</c> can grant the spirits Attack Speed, damage.
tooltipMarkup.ChenStormEarthFireElementalConduitTalent: Increase the spirits' Health to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of Chen's maximum Health and all of their Abilities are empowered.
tooltipMarkup.ChenStormstoutSecretRecipe: Chen heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(100*Effect,ChenStormstoutSecretRecipeCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction)+.01"Precision="1"/>%</c> of his maximum Health when his Basic Abilities hit an enemy Hero.
tooltipMarkup.ChenWanderingKeg: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,ChenWanderingKegCasterBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor)*100" player="0"/>%</c> increased Movement Speed and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenWanderingKegArmorBuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus" player ="0"/></c> Armor, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChenWanderingKegDamage,Amount[0]"/></c> damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenWanderingKegCasterBuff,Duration[0]"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChenWanderingKegUntappedPotentialTalent: Increase Wandering Keg's Movement Speed bonus from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenWanderingKegCasterBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"Precision="2"Player="0"/>%</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="((Behavior,ChenWanderingKegCasterBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor)+Talent,ChenMasteryWanderingKegUntappedPotential,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value)*100" player="0"/>%</c>, and its Armor bonus to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenWanderingKegArmorBuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus + Talent,ChenMasteryWanderingKegUntappedPotential,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[3].Value" player = "0"/></c> for its duration and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ChenMasteryWanderingKegUntappedPotential,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> seconds afterwards.
tooltipMarkup.ChenWitheringFlames: Igniting an enemy Hero reduces their Spell Power by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ChenBreathofFireWitheringFlamesTalentDebuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChenBreathofFireWitheringFlamesTalentDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
